prompt: Tap left hole card to keep your read and action aligned.
why_v1: Card anchors keep your decision process consistent.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Ah is the anchor card, so the read stays tied to the exact hole-card cue this line is built on.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The ace of hearts matters because that card changes blocker strength and nut potential, which is critical once deep cash stacks can keep applying pressure.
